title: Architecture Decision Record
description: A single architecture decision record (ADR). Records a technology or architecture decision with context, consequences, and alternatives considered. The top-level 'version' field is a repository-specific schema metadata extension consumed by the validation scripts.

schema_version.description: Version of the ADR schema this file was written against.

title.description: Short decision title (e.g., 'Use TypeScript for Backend and Frontend').

superseded_by.description: If status is 'Superseded', the ADR that replaces this one.

date.description: Date the decision was made or last updated.

deciders.description: Who was involved in making the decision.

context.description: What is the issue motivating this decision? Background and problem statement.

decision.description: What is the change being made? The chosen approach.

easier.description: What becomes easier because of this decision.

harder.description: What becomes harder because of this decision.

alternatives.description: Alternatives that were considered and rejected.

references.description: Optional references to related ADRs, constraints, or external resources.

name.description: Name of the alternative (e.g., 'Go backend + TypeScript frontend').

description.description: Optional description of the alternative approach.

reason_rejected.description: Why this alternative was not chosen.
